_publications._publicationTitle: Ras-driven transcriptome analysis identifies aurora kinase A as a potential malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor therapeutic target.

_contextSnippet: shAURKA reduced AURKA mRNA expression 3.7-fold relative to a non-targeting shRNA; shAURKB reduced AURKB mRNA expression 5.8-fold...Knocking down expression of either AURKA or AURKB reduced MPNST cell accumulation
details: shAURKA reduced AURKA mRNA expression 3.7-fold relative to non-targeting shRNA; shAURKB reduced AURKB mRNA expression 5.8-fold. Both reduced MPNST cell accumulation at 5 days after infection.
